channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ontario and Quebec rural groups raise environmental and property concerns over proposed Alto high-speed rail project
item.description: Farmers, environmental organizations, snowmobiling groups and rural residents are voicing concerns about the proposed Alto high-speed rail network planned to connect Toronto and Quebec City. The feder...

item.title: Piapot First Nation and volunteers support North Central neighbourhood cleanup in Regina
item.description: Members of Piapot First Nation joined local community volunteers in Regina’s North Central neighbourhood to take part in a coordinated cleanup effort aimed at improving the appearance and safety of th...

item.title: Federal High Court announces passing of Justice Mohammed Nasir Yunusa, honours judicial service and integrity
item.description: The Federal High Court has announced the death of Hon. Justice Mohammed Nasir Yunusa, who served in the Kano Judicial Division. According to an official statement released by the court’s Director of I...

item.title: Amaechi Disputes Tinubu’s Claim of Being Key to Buhari’s 2015 Election Victory
item.description: Former Minister of Transportation, Rotimi Amaechi, don push back against President Bola Tinubu’s repeated claim say him played the main role in making late Muhammadu Buhari win the 2015 presidential e...

item.title: US, Iran continue peace negotiations despite major disagreements over uranium and Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Nagpapatuloy ang diplomatic talks sa pagitan ng United States at Iran habang sinusubukan ng magkabilang panig na mapanatili ang marupok na ceasefire matapos ang ilang linggo ng digmaan sa Middle East....

item.title: Montreal tribunal orders landlord to pay $62,000 to tenant with cancer over bad faith eviction
item.description: A tribunal in Montreal has ruled that a landlord must pay $62,000 in compensation to a tenant who is battling cancer and to the tenant’s spouse after finding that the eviction was carried out in bad f...

item.title: Rod Stewart’s Career and Style Evolution in the 1980s
item.description: The article reviews Rod Stewart’s transformation during the 1980s, a decade in which the British singer successfully adapted to changing musical trends while facing both commercial success and critica...

item.title: SAIIA Conference Explores Electoral Reform, Coalition Governance and the Role of Civil Society in South Africa
item.description: The South African Institute of International Affairs (SAIIA) hosted a two-day conference on 11 and 12 May focused on the evolving role of civil society in South Africa’s changing democratic landscape....

item.title: MPA Sarah Ahmad highlights Pakistan-China friendship as pillar of regional stability and youth cooperation
item.description: MPA Sarah Ahmad, Chairperson of the Child Protection Bureau Punjab, has underscored the long-standing Pakistan-China friendship as a key symbol of regional stability, development, and prosperity. She ...

item.title: List of Scholarships Available for Indian and International Students in 2026
item.description: The news article provides detailed information about various scholarships available for students in India and abroad for the year 2026. Among the notable opportunities, the University of Bath in the U...

item.title: Rare Childhood Photos Trace Joan Baez’s Early Life and Influences Before Her Music Career
item.description: The article from Vintage Everyday presents a collection of 18 rare childhood photographs of American folk singer and activist Joan Baez, documenting her early years during the 1940s and 1950s. Alongsi...

item.title: Photographic Retrospective of Jimmy Page During His Session Work and Yardbirds Era in the 1960s
item.description: This article presents a visual retrospective focused on Jimmy Page during the mid and late 1960s, a formative period before and during the early rise of Led Zeppelin. Born in 1944, Jimmy Page became o...

item.title: Collingwood survive strong West Coast challenge in Scott Pendlebury’s record AFL appearance
item.description: Collingwood have held off a determined West Coast Eagles side to secure a 10-point victory in a tightly contested AFL match at the MCG, played during Scott Pendlebury’s record-breaking 433rd game. Whi...

item.title: RSPCA advises dog owners on safe use of damp towels to prevent heatstroke in pets
item.description: The RSPCA has issued guidance to dog owners regarding the use of damp towels as a method to keep pets cool during hot weather. While many pet owners rely on this common technique to help prevent heats...

item.title: Hannah Murray Describes Her Experience with a Wellness Cult and Mental Health Crisis in New Memoir
item.description: Actor Hannah Murray, best known for her roles in Skins and Game of Thrones, has spoken openly about her experiences with fame, the pressures of acting, and the psychological breakdown that followed he...

item.title: Boni Khalwale Pays Tribute to Cousin Boaz Shipimilu After His Death
item.description: Kakamega Senator Boni Khalwale has announced the death of his cousin, Boaz Lichooti Shipimilu, describing him as a respected teacher and politician who made a strong contribution to the education sect...

item.title: Analysis of Speaker Mike Johnson’s Political Position Amid Growing GOP and Trump Tensions
item.description: This opinion article by John Casey published on Raw Story examines the political standing of U.S. House Speaker Mike Johnson in relation to President Donald Trump and internal Republican Party tension...

item.title: Marilyn Gladu discusses leaving the Conservatives and her conversations with Mark Carney amid party tensions
item.description: Conservative MP Marilyn Gladu has offered new details about her decision to cross the floor and join the Liberal Party, citing dissatisfaction within the Conservative caucus and describing what she ca...

item.title: Experts call for broader reforms beyond strict laws to address unsafe abortions in Tanzania
item.description: A recent investigation by The Citizen has revealed the growing underground network of unsafe abortions in Tanzania, showing how women are increasingly relying on secret channels due to fear, limited r...

item.title: Collingwood edge West Coast in Pendlebury record game overshadowed by late injuries
item.description: In a dramatic AFL clash at the MCG, Collingwood faced West Coast in a match that will be remembered for Scott Pendlebury setting a new games record and a series of late-game injuries that overshadowed...
